sections.heading: Stage IIB Mycosis Fungoides (Tumor Stage Disease)
sections.content: {"pathway_id": "MF_Stage_IIB", "title": "Stage IIB Mycosis Fungoides (Tumor Stage Disease)", "branching_basis": ["Limited vs. generalized tumor lesions", "Response to initial therapy"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Limited tumor lesions", "options": [{"type": "local_therapy", "label": "Local RT and/or skin-directed therapy", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "RT (8-12 Gy palliative or 24-30 Gy definitive), TSEBT, topical therapies", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "systemic_therapy", "label": "Systemic therapy ± local RT ± skin-directed therapy", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Bexarotene, brentuximab vedotin, interferon alfa, methotrexate, mogamulizumab, romidepsin; other recommended: vorinostat, pembrolizumab; useful: acitretin, denileukin diftitox-cxdl, ECP, interferon gamma-1b, isotretinoin", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": ""}}, {"criteria": "Generalized tumor lesions", "options": [{"type": "skin_directed_therapy", "label": "TSEBT", "preference": "", "recommendation": "", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "systemic_therapy", "label": "Systemic therapy + skin-directed therapy", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Single agents: bexarotene, brentuximab vedotin, denileukin diftitox-cxdl, gemcitabin", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": ""}}]}

flowcharts.title: Stage IA Mycosis Fungoides (Limited Skin Involvement, <10% BSA)

nodes.label: Criteria: Stage IA MF, no FMF or LCT

Skin-directed therapies (alone or in combination)
Preferred
Topical corticosteroids, phototherapy (UVB/narrowband UVB), topical mechlorethamine, topical retinoids (bexarotene), low-dose local RT (8-12 Gy) or involved-site RT (ISRT) (24-30 Gy for unilesional presentation)

Systemic therapy + skin-directed therapy
Useful in certain circumstances
Bexarotene, interferon alfa, methotrexate; alternative retinoids (acitretin, isotretinoin), interferon gamma-1b, extracorporeal photopheresis (ECP) if blood involvement (B1)
Criteria: Inadequate response to skin-directed therapy or persistent/symptomatic T1 disease

Manage as Stage IB-IIA or consider RT if not previously used
See MFSS-7 for Stage IB-IIA treatment options

Clinical trial
(no specific recommendation)

edges.label: Inadequate response or persistent/symptomatic T1 disease
Inadequate response or persistent/symptomatic T1 disease

flowcharts.title: Stage IB-IIA Mycosis Fungoides (Skin-Only Disease with ≥10% BSA or Limited Node Involvement)

nodes.label: Stage IB-IIA Mycosis Fungoides - Assess Skin Disease Burden
Lower skin disease burden (e.g., predominantly patch disease)
Higher skin disease burden (e.g., predominantly plaque disease)

Skin-directed therapies
Preferred
Phototherapy (UVB/narrowband UVB, PUVA, UVA1), topical corticosteroids, topical mechlorethamine, TSEBT (12-36 Gy)

Systemic therapy + skin-directed therapy
Useful in certain circumstances
Bexarotene, brentuximab vedotin, interferon alfa, methotrexate, mogamulizumab, romidepsin, vorinostat; alternative retinoids, denileukin diftitox-cxdl, ECP, interferon gamma-1b, alemtuzumab, gemcitabine, liposomal doxorubicin, pembrolizumab, pralatrexate

Skin-directed therapies
Preferred
Phototherapy (PUVA, UVA1), TSEBT, topical corticosteroids, topical mechlorethamine

Systemic therapy + skin-directed therapy
Preferred
Bexarotene, brentuximab vedotin, interferon alfa, methotrexate, mogamulizumab, romidepsin, vorinostat
Inadequate response or progression to > stage IB-IIA

Manage as Stage IIB or consider clinical trial
See MFSS-8/9 for Stage IIB treatment options

Clinical trial
(no specific recommendation)

flowcharts.title: Stage IIB Mycosis Fungoides (Tumor Stage Disease)

nodes.label: Stage IIB Mycosis Fungoides - Assess Tumor Lesions
Limited tumor lesions
Generalized tumor lesions

Local RT and/or skin-directed therapy
Preferred
RT (8-12 Gy palliative or 24-30 Gy definitive), TSEBT, topical therapies

Systemic therapy ± local RT ± skin-directed therapy
Preferred
Bexarotene, brentuximab vedotin, interferon alfa, methotrexate, mogamulizumab, romidepsin; other recommended: vorinostat, pembrolizumab; useful: acitretin, denileukin diftitox-cxdl, ECP, interferon gamma-1b, isotretinoin

TSEBT
(no preference)

Systemic therapy + skin-directed therapy
Preferred
Single agents: bexarotene, brentuximab vedotin, denileukin diftitox-cxdl, gemcitabin
